creator: t80382@naoe.t.u-tokyo.ac.jp
text:
I want to use VisualWorks Non-Commercial for Linux
(ObjectShare, Inc. : http://www.objectshare.com/VWNC/)
and Jun for Smalltalk
(Open GL Library for Smalltalk : http://www.sra.co.jp/people/aoki/Jun/)
on FreeBSD.

So I want newer Mesa ports running on Linux emulator but not exist.
Then I made Ports of MesaLib-3.0 on Linux emulator

Probably not perfect, but please modify and add this to Ports Collection.

Thank you.
